data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram uses a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Containers managed with Kubernetes and Docker, multiple APIs handling different services.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: GraphQL used for efficient data retrieval and to reduce network requests.
data.technical_spec: A single endpoint for handling complex queries, running on Node.js and Apollo Server.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content Delivery Network used for optimizing content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Integration with services like Akamai or Cloudflare to cache static and dynamic content.

data.title: Distributed Databases
data.description: High availability maintained through distributed databases.
data.technical_spec: Sharded databases like Cassandra, along with Postgres for data storage.

data.title: Real-Time Data Processing
data.description: Real-time data processing for features like live feeds and updates.
data.technical_spec: Streams and message queues processed through Apache Kafka.
